title: Emails on computer show date and time as the date and time I opened Thunderbird and not the actuals
creator: b22schmidt
content: When I open Thunderbird email on my computer, it loads in my emails. These come from my Hostgator email server. The date and time of the emails show as the current date and time, not the actual date and time that the emails were received on the Hostgator server. For example, if an email was actually received on Hostgator 3 days ago at 5 pm. When I open Thunderbird at 9 am today, the date and time received will show today at 9 am. And nothing that I can see on the email that I have on my computer shows the actual receipt date. I have tried some things on my own, and I have chatted with AI and made some changes to what's showing on the headers. But nothing has worked to resolve the issue.

title: Problem Creating "New SubFolder" and "New Folder"
creator: hill4
content:
Hi,

I have been using Thunderbird as my preferred email client since around 2004 on Linux, macOS and Windows.

I am current running Thunderbird 150.0.2 64-bit on macOS Tahoe 26.5 ( Intel ).

When I attempt to create a new 'Folder' or 'Sub Folder' on either an iMAP account or, more importantly, my 'Local Folder' the displayed dialogue box is sized incorrectly and I am unable to complete the action.

Specifically I can type into the 'Name' text box and see the 'Create as a subfolder of" drop down dialogue but the two buttons below are barely visible and I cannot select either with my mouse. Nor can I resize the dialogue box itself [ make larger ] to enable to be select either button.

I can use the <TAB> key to cycle thorough the various items and the <RETURN> key to select an option.

I have attached a sample image of the issue.

Thanks.

title: What Are the Best Surf Spots in the World with DHM Surf Camp?
creator: dhmsurfcamp
content: Discover the best surf spots in the world with DHM Surf Camp and experience unforgettable waves, tropical beaches, and expert surf guidance. From the legendary breaks of Bali surfing to the crystal-clear waters of Lombok, every destination offers a unique surfing adventure for beginners and experienced riders alike. If you are searching for the perfect place to surf in Lombok, DHM Surf Camp provides professional coaching, comfortable accommodation, and easy access to world-class surf spots. Checking the surf forecast Lombok before your session helps you catch the best waves and enjoy ideal conditions throughout your stay. Whether you want long rides, reef breaks, or relaxing beach vibes, Indonesia remains one of the top surfing destinations on the planet. Join DHM Surf Camp to improve your skills, explore stunning coastlines, and create unforgettable memories on your next surf trip.
